instruction: Summarize the CVE description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: Inappropriate implementation in in Permission prompts in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 109.0.5414.74 allowed a remote attacker to force acceptance of a permission prompt via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)
output: The vulnerability involves an improper implementation in permission prompts within Google Chrome on Windows versions before 109.0.5414.74, which allows a remote attacker to manipulate a user into automatically accepting a permission request through a specially crafted HTML page.
